advisory.title: ASA-2024-011: Vote Extensions — Panic when receiving a Pre-commit with invalid data
advisory.description: CometBFT advisory ASA-2024-011 covers a panic in vote-extension handling on ABCI 2.0 chains. A peer running modified code can craft a Vote message with an invalid ValidatorIndex; the receiver dereferences the validator set with the bad index without bounds-checking, panicking the consensus reactor. The v0.38.14..v0.38.15 patch (commit 3a023da3a) adds index validation in consensus/state.go and a new error in consensus/errors.go. Affects v0.38.x < v0.38.15 (and unreleased v1.x/main); fixed in v0.38.15.

timeline.notes: vulnerableHead is the v0.38.13 release commit, an unambiguously vulnerable release in the >=0.38.0,<v0.38.15 range. (v0.38.14 was released and retracted due to a non-security regression in cometbft-db; the advisory marks v0.38.15 as the recommended patched version.) The introducing commit is the early consensus-state commit that established consensus/state.go in its current location.

expectedOutcome.description: Scanner should flag the missing ValidatorIndex bounds check in consensus/state.go that lets a peer panic the consensus reactor by submitting a Precommit Vote with a malformed ValidatorIndex on a chain with vote extensions enabled.

checks.name: advisory_published
checks.details: ASA-2024-011 (GHSA-p7mv-53f2-4cwj) was published on 2024-11-06 with the patch in cometbft v0.38.15.

checks.name: vulnerable_head_in_advisory_range
checks.details: vulnerableHead is the v0.38.13 release commit, an unambiguously vulnerable tag in the >=0.38.0,<v0.38.15 range (v0.38.14 was retracted).
